reviewed_surfaces.finding: export_diagnostics remains action_role=support_artifact, mutates_runtime=false, affects_primary_truth=false, and post_action_refresh_required=false.
diagnostics export result reduces bundle_path to basename, normalizes redaction_status, adds support_artifact_only claim scope, and replaces changed_files with diagnostics_bundle markers.
redaction proof is normalized to enabled, failed, or unreported; missing proof is not promoted to enabled.
export diagnostics compact action panel uses diagnosticsExportResultModel state/visual/copy instead of generic ok success.
action ledger entries for export diagnostics use diagnosticsExportResultModel state and visual class.
expanded export details show artifact_ref, redaction state, changed_files count, and support_artifact_only scope.
diagnostics export states include created, redaction_unreported, redaction_failed, artifact_unavailable, timeout, invalid_json, running, command_error, and integration_failure.
tests assert missing redaction proof is amber/unreported, full paths do not leak, enabled redaction is support blue, failed redaction is red, and no runtime-health green appears.
tests assert basename-only artifact metadata, diagnostics_bundle markers, redaction_status normalization, support_artifact_only scope, and no private tmp paths in returned JSON.

adjacent_risks.summary: A read-only inspector noted desktop shell diagnostics export path display as a future parity topic. This web/live-server contour did not change desktop/native surfaces.
